scope: Shared MMOG fabric beneath multiplayer-fabric-xr-dev (VR) and multiplayer-fabric-rpg (RPG): engine assembly, zone networking, and interest management.
win_condition: All four TUI scenarios (concert, chokepoint, convoy, ragdoll) complete with 16 mires visible in zone_console, 20 Hz tick maintained throughout, and zero entity loss — all in a terminal. No VR headset, no GPU, no Godot window required.

stack.zone_server: multiplayer-fabric-humanoid-project — headless Godot running mire.tscn; 20 Hz constant-work loop; 100-byte entity snapshots
stack.bots: taskweft/picoquic — C++20, HTN planner, ~15 MB each; not full Godot processes

pass_conditions.vrm_visible: VRM character loads in mire.tscn; MToon shader and humanoid skeleton work
pass_conditions.character_steps: Basic rigid-body plane collision and input routing functional
pass_conditions.zone_connect: WebTransport HTTP/3 handshake succeeds between client and zone-backend
pass_conditions.all_mires: Zone server logs 16 registered players in each scenario
pass_conditions.tick_rate: 20 Hz held; tick=50ms in TUI status bar for all 4 scenarios
pass_conditions.clean_shutdown: FabricSnapshot written after each scenario; positions recoverable
pass_conditions.lasso_query_returns_poi: VR lasso query returns a non-null POI when the test scene is live
pass_conditions.call_gui_input_fires: call_gui_input routing fires for synthesized Control input events
pass_conditions.btn_pressed_fires: btn_pressed signal fires through call_gui_input routing
pass_conditions.virtual_input_fires: virtual_input also fires via call_gui_input path
pass_conditions.slider_value_changes: Slider value emits value_changed via call_gui_input routing

concert.description: All 16 bots converge to the same zone area. Local players fill authority budget; remote players fill interest/replica budget. Proves lo + re ≤ (cap − headroom) + InterestCapacity.

chokepoint.description: Bots rush through a narrow corridor, reaching speeds above vMaxPhysical (10 m/s) due to crowd pressure. Zone server registers funnel segment with per-segment velocity cap.
chokepoint.pass: No entity exits BVH ghost bound; funnel velocity override logged; no SCRIPT ERROR

convoy.description: Mover entity leads cabin bots on a periodic route crossing the zone boundary. One full cycle = 2 × wpPeriodMin. STAGING migration completes before phase reversal.
convoy.pass: All cabin bots complete ≥ 2 zone crossings; wpPeriodValid holds; no cabin lost during STAGING

ragdoll.description: Bots collide head-on at g13_vTrue = 15 m/s (above vMaxPhysical). C1 clamps to vMaxPhysical; C2 uses aHalfMinForearm in ghost bound expansion.
ragdoll.pass: Server clamps impulse velocities (C1); ghost bound uses aHalfMinForearm (C2); tick p99 ≤ 2× baseline
